Name: insert_department_files
SQL: WITH check_nested_file_0 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::uuid AS "id", $2::text AS "bucket_id") AS data WHERE true), nested_file_0 AS (INSERT INTO "storage"."files" ("id", "bucket_id") SELECT check_nested_file_0."id", check_nested_file_0."bucket_id" FROM check_nested_file_0 RETURNING *), check_nested_file_1 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $3::uuid AS "id", $4::text AS "bucket_id") AS data WHERE true), nested_file_1 AS (INSERT INTO "storage"."files" ("id", "bucket_id") SELECT check_nested_file_1."id", check_nested_file_1."bucket_id" FROM check_nested_file_1 RETURNING *), check_mutation_result_0 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $5::uuid AS "id", $6::text AS "description", $7::uuid AS "department_id", nested_file_0."id" AS "file_id" FROM nested_file_0) AS data WHERE true), mutation_result_0 AS (INSERT INTO "public"."department_files" ("id", "description", "department_id", "file_id") SELECT check_mutation_result_0."id", check_mutation_result_0."description", check_mutation_result_0."department_id", nested_file_0."id" FROM check_mutation_result_0, nested_file_0 RETURNING *), check_mutation_result_1 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $8::uuid AS "id", $9::text AS "description", $10::uuid AS "department_id", nested_file_1."id" AS "file_id" FROM nested_file_1) AS data WHERE true), mutation_result_1 AS (INSERT INTO "public"."department_files" ("id", "description", "department_id", "file_id") SELECT check_mutation_result_1."id", check_mutation_result_1."description", check_mutation_result_1."department_id", nested_file_1."id" FROM check_mutation_result_1, nested_file_1 RETURNING *), mutation_result AS (SELECT mutation_result_0."id", mutation_result_0."file_id", mutation_result_0."department_id", mutation_result_0."description" FROM mutation_result_0 UNION ALL SELECT mutation_result_1."id", mutation_result_1."file_id", mutation_result_1."department_id", mutation_result_1."description" FROM mutation_result_1) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_file_0) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_file_1)), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", mutation_result."file_id" AS "file_id", mutation_result."description" AS "description", "mutation_result.r.file"."file" AS "file" FROM mutation_result LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "mutation_result.r.file.base" AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT nested_file_0."id" AS "id", nested_file_0."created_at" AS "created_at", nested_file_0."updated_at" AS "updated_at", nested_file_0."bucket_id" AS "bucket_id", nested_file_0."name" AS "name", nested_file_0."size" AS "size", nested_file_0."mime_type" AS "mime_type", nested_file_0."etag" AS "etag", nested_file_0."is_uploaded" AS "is_uploaded", nested_file_0."uploaded_by_user_id" AS "uploaded_by_user_id", nested_file_0."metadata" AS "metadata" FROM nested_file_0 UNION ALL SELECT nested_file_1."id" AS "id", nested_file_1."created_at" AS "created_at", nested_file_1."updated_at" AS "updated_at", nested_file_1."bucket_id" AS "bucket_id", nested_file_1."name" AS "name", nested_file_1."size" AS "size", nested_file_1."mime_type" AS "mime_type", nested_file_1."etag" AS "etag", nested_file_1."is_uploaded" AS "is_uploaded", nested_file_1."uploaded_by_user_id" AS "uploaded_by_user_id", nested_file_1."metadata" AS "metadata" FROM nested_file_1 UNION ALL SELECT "storage"."files"."id" AS "id", "storage"."files"."created_at" AS "created_at", "storage"."files"."updated_at" AS "updated_at", "storage"."files"."bucket_id" AS "bucket_id", "storage"."files"."name" AS "name", "storage"."files"."size" AS "size", "storage"."files"."mime_type" AS "mime_type", "storage"."files"."etag" AS "etag", "storage"."files"."is_uploaded" AS "is_uploaded", "storage"."files"."uploaded_by_user_id" AS "uploaded_by_user_id", "storage"."files"."metadata" AS "metadata" FROM "storage"."files" WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT nested_file_0."id" AS "id" FROM nested_file_0 UNION ALL SELECT nested_file_1."id" AS "id" FROM nested_file_1) AS "mutation_result.r.file.source.nested_keys" WHERE "mutation_result.r.file.source.nested_keys"."id" = "storage"."files"."id")) AS "mutation_result.r.file.source" WHERE "mutation_result"."file_id" = "id" LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "mutation_result.r.file.base"."id" AS "id", "mutation_result.r.file.base"."bucket_id" AS "bucketId") AS "_e")) AS "file" FROM "mutation_result.r.file.base") AS "mutation_result.r.file" ON ('true') WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_file_0) IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_file_1) IS NOT NULL) AS "_e"))
